Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x2C40 "STEELEAGLE-07D0-2C40" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 jsr $07d0 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Steel Eagle.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $07D0 to turn off interrupts from the two CIA chips and ack any pending CIA interrupts to allow the game to run correctly. The loading screen is from the Spectrum version.
